infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NovaShield needs camera access to record video evidence of police encounters for your civil rights documentation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NovaShield needs microphone access to capture audio in video evidence recordings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NovaShield needs photo library access to save video evidence to your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: NovaShield needs permission to save video evidence to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: NovaShield needs camera access to record video evidence of police encounters.
plugins.microphonePermission: NovaShield needs microphone access to capture audio in video evidence recordings.

plugins.photosPermission: NovaShield needs photo library access to save your video evidence.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: NovaShield needs permission to save video evidence to your photo library.
